description: Improve your e-commerce or social network engagement by tapping into the power of emojis. Our email template is designed to gather valuable feedback and calculate your Net Promoter Score (NPS), an essential metric in human resources and customer satisfaction. Using emojis, this template encourages users to express their feelings in a fun and engaging way. Its light, blue-themed design is pleasing to the eye and perfectly suited for computer & internet related businesses. Celebrate World Emoji Day by utilizing this innovative survey method and enhance your online presence. This template is a game changer, revolutionizing traditional surveys and making feedback collection more interactive and enjoyable.
short_description: Boost engagement on your e-commerce or social network with our emoji-based email template. Designed for effective feedback collection and NPS calculation, this light, blue-themed template revolutionizes traditional surveys, making them interactive and enjoyable. Perfect for World Emoji Day celebrations and computer & internet businesses.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
